summary: MetaobjectDefinitionCreate limit capture for public Admin 2026-04. The script proves 40 admin-filterable fields are accepted, 41 field definitions are rejected, shopify--form public creates are rejected before field-count validation, and the live shop definition boundary returns MAX_DEFINITIONS_EXCEEDED at 128 definitions.
